use_cases: Hero sections showcasing product demo videos with animated dialog overlays
Portfolio pages displaying video content with smooth entrance animations
Landing pages with promotional video presentations triggered by user clicks
Creative portfolios featuring video work with custom animation styles
Product pages showcasing video demos with elegant modal interactions
ai_summary: A HeroVideoDialog component that displays video content in an animated modal overlay with 8 different animation styles including fade, scale, slide, and directional transitions. Features a thumbnail preview that opens a full video player dialog on click with smooth framer-motion animations for entrance and exit.
